title: cyperus hillebrandii var. decipiens
intro: Cyperus hillebrandii var. decipiens, also known as the Hillebrand's flatsedge, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Polynesian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus hillebrandii var. decipiens include the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a salve or infusion, which can be applied topically to affected areas or consumed as a tea to promote overall well-being.
